title: PlayerRewards
description: A simple and easy-to-use player rewards plugin

## 1. Introduction

> **PlayerRewards** — A simple and easy-to-use player rewards plugin.  
> Server owners can easily create activation codes and gifts through simple commands, and players can claim rewards by
> using the activation codes.

**Features:**

1. Supports MySQL and local SQLite storage
2. Create a specific activation code
3. Batch create one-time activation codes
4. Directly create reward items
